title: Bring the Kids and Grab Some Barbecue: A Day at the Ukrainian Drone Races
summary_full: Competitions that give soldiers a brief break from the front have a festival-like atmosphere, a mix of potentially deadly weapons and frolicking children.
summary_public: Competitions that give soldiers a brief break from the front have a festival-like atmosphere, a mix of potentially deadly weapons and frolicking children.
